pr_title: Fix inverted flight search availability filter
pr_body:
## Summary
Correct the flight search `only_available` filter so fully booked flights are excluded when `only_available=true`, and flights with remaining seats are not hidden when `only_available=false`.

## Planned changes
- Fix availability logic in `backend/app/services/flight_service.py::search_flights`
- Add/adjust regression tests in `backend/app/tests/test_flight_service.py`

## Validation
- Targeted backend tests for flight search/service behavior
- Manual reproduction of the reported search scenario

## Notes
- Change is intentionally localized to preserve unrelated search behavior.
reviewer_summary: Draft PR opened and awaiting human review.
